title: Luffy Looks for Enel
description: Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene focuses on Enel, Luffy, Nami, Aisa, Gan Fall. Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What's with that gold around your arm?

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: Heading for the bell as well, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: She's a woman with orange hair.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Nami should be up on that shi-

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ms. Nagivator! Mr. Long-nose! Mr. Cook!

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Also! Where's Luffy? Wasn't he with you!?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: What!? So we just missed him!?

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: Damn it! There's no time left!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: I'll let you have your way!

summary: Luffy pushes toward Enel and the bell, carrying the hopes of the Straw Hats, Shandia, and Skypieans into the final climb.
